requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Poland should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator (CPO), fleet operator, commercial real-estate owner, local municipality, or DSO-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU harmonised standards (EN 55032, EN 55035, EN IEC 61851-21-2) and IEC 61000 power-quality standards. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under RED 2014/53/EU and Polish regulatory requirements. Poland's rapidly growing EV charging ecosystem increasingly requires OCPP-capable hardware to participate in national e-mobility platforms (e.g., GovTech/AFIR data reporting obligations).
summary.zh: 在波兰，若充电点运营商（CPO）、车队运营商、商业地产业主、当地市政机构或DSO相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU协调标准（EN 55032、EN 55035、EN IEC 61851-21-2）及IEC 61000电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据无线设备指令2014/53/EU及波兰法规要求触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。波兰快速增长的电动汽车充电生态系统越来越要求具备OCPP能力的硬件参与国家电动出行平台（如政府技术/AFIR数据报告义务）。
summary.zht: 在波蘭，若充電點運營商（CPO）、車隊運營商、商業地產業主、當地市政機構或DSO相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU協調標準（EN 55032、EN 55035、EN IEC 61851-21-2）及IEC 61000電能質量標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據無線設備指令2014/53/EU及波蘭法規要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。波蘭快速增長的電動汽車充電生態系統越來越要求具備OCPP能力的硬件參與國家電動出行平台（如政府技術/AFIR數據報告義務）。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers (OCPP 1.6 and OCPP 2.0.1 in common Polish/EU CPO use)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
EN 55032 / EN 55035 — CE marking harmonised EMC standards under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU
EN IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board EV chargers
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — for radio equipment including Wi-Fi, cellular, RFID modules
Polish national AFIR data reporting and e-mobility platform obligations where applicable

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment (e.g., Alipay/WeChat integrated systems), SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Polish operators, roaming, PLN currency, Polish language interfaces, and EU data-access requirements under AFIR.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付（如支付宝/微信集成系统）、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为波兰运营商、漫游、波兰兹罗提货币、波兰语界面以及AFIR下欧盟数据访问要求重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付（如支付寶/微信集成系統）、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為波蘭運營商、漫遊、波蘭茲羅提貨幣、波蘭語界面以及AFIR下歐盟數據訪問要求重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version (1.6 or 2.0.1), charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module CE/RED approval path, and EMC test reports to EU standards (EN 55032, EN 55035, EN IEC 61851-21-2) for the final Poland configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the Polish DSO supply point requirements. China-market payment and language integrations will require reconfiguration for the Polish market (PLN currency, Polish-language UI, EU data reporting). For AFIR-compliant public chargers, OCPP 2.0.1 may be required to support smart recharging and static/dynamic data obligations.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终波兰配置的OCPP版本（1.6或2.0.1）、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块CE/RED审批路径，以及符合欧盟标准（EN 55032、EN 55035、EN IEC 61851-21-2）的EMC测试报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合波兰DSO供电点要求进行审查。中国市场支付和语言集成须为波兰市场重新配置（波兰兹罗提货币、波兰语UI、欧盟数据报告）。对于符合AFIR的公共充电桩，可能须采用OCPP 2.0.1以支持智能充电和静态/动态数据义务。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終波蘭配置的OCPP版本（1.6或2.0.1）、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組CE/RED審批路徑，以及符合歐盟標準（EN 55032、EN 55035、EN IEC 61851-21-2）的EMC測試報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合波蘭DSO供電點要求進行審查。中國市場支付和語言集成須為波蘭市場重新配置（波蘭茲羅提貨幣、波蘭語UI、歐盟數據報告）。對於符合AFIR的公共充電樁，可能須採用OCPP 2.0.1以支持智能充電和靜態/動態數據義務。

mandatory_status.target: EMC CE marking under Directive 2014/30/EU is mandatory for EU/Polish market placement; RED compliance under 2014/53/EU is mandatory where radio modules are incorporated; OCPP is a practical market requirement for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers in Poland; AFIR data reporting and smart recharging obligations apply to in-scope public infrastructure
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence; Chinese radio module approvals are not EU RED substitutes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Poland networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration (1.6 or 2.0.1 as required), CE-marked EMC compliance under Directive 2014/30/EU using EN harmonised standards, RED compliance where radio modules are present, Polish DSO power-quality and harmonic requirements, and AFIR data obligations for public deployments. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. China-market payment and UI integrations require reconfiguration for Polish operators.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 波兰联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成（按要求采用1.6或2.0.1）、依据2014/30/EU指令和EN协调标准的CE标志EMC合规、存在无线模块时的RED合规、波兰DSO电能质量和谐波要求，以及公共部署的AFIR数据义务。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。中国市场支付和UI集成须为波兰运营商重新配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波蘭聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成（按要求採用1.6或2.0.1）、依據2014/30/EU指令和EN協調標準的CE標誌EMC合規、存在無線模組時的RED合規、波蘭DSO電能質量和諧波要求，以及公共部署的AFIR數據義務。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。中國市場支付和UI集成須為波蘭運營商重新配置。
